prompt: Aesthetic collage portrait of a young man with soft natural lighting, wearing a light-colored floral or linen shirt, relaxed and confident pose. Long or medium-length slightly messy hair, gentle smile, candid expressions. Background with warm earthy tones, greenery and textured wall Vintage scrapbook style layout with torn paper edges, dried flowers, butterflies, handwritten notes and soft romantic quotes. Include multiple frames of the same person in different poses (close-up, side pose, looking away, smiling with eyes closed). Add soft shadows, warm color grading, dreamy and calm vibe, Pinterest-style aesthetic, high quality, natural skin tones.
